description: bapX built-in tools — installed in every sandbox

pptx.name: PowerPoint
pptx.desc: Create, read, edit .pptx decks, slides, notes, templates

pdf.name: PDF Editor
pdf.desc: Edit PDF text, merge, split, extract pages, OCR via natural language

ocr.name: OCR Engine
ocr.desc: Extract text from images, PDFs, scans using tesseract + pymupdf

youtube.name: YouTube
youtube.desc: Get transcripts, summarize videos, search channels

notion.name: Notion
notion.desc: Create, read, update Notion pages, databases via API

linear.name: Linear
linear.desc: Manage issues, projects, teams via Linear GraphQL API

airtable.name: Airtable
airtable.desc: CRUD records, filter, sort, upsert Airtable bases

email.name: Email
email.desc: Send, receive, search email via IMAP/SMTP

gws.name: Google Workspace
gws.desc: Access Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets

maps.name: Maps
maps.desc: Geocode, search POIs, get routes, timezones via OpenStreetMap

arxiv.name: arXiv
arxiv.desc: Search papers by keyword/author/category, get abstracts

rss.name: RSS Reader
rss.desc: Monitor blogs and RSS/Atom feeds, get updates

wiki.name: Wiki
wiki.desc: Build and query interlinked markdown knowledge base

x.name: X/Twitter
x.desc: Post tweets, search, DMs, get trends via API

spotify.name: Spotify
spotify.desc: Play, search, queue tracks, manage playlists and devices

gif.name: GIF Search
gif.desc: Search and download GIFs via Tenor API

diagram.name: Diagrams
diagram.desc: Generate Excalidraw JSON diagrams and SVG architecture diagrams

humantext.name: Humanizer
humantext.desc: Strip AI-isms, add natural voice, vary sentence structure

notebook.name: Jupyter Notebook
notebook.desc: Run interactive Python notebooks with live kernel

ascii.name: ASCII Art
ascii.desc: Generate ASCII art: banners, cowsay, image-to-ascii, boxes

sketch.name: HTML Sketch
sketch.desc: Build throwaway HTML/CSS mockups and design variants

p5.name: p5.js Sketch
p5.desc: Create p5.js generative art, shaders, interactive 3D scenes

deploy-vercel.name: Vercel Deploy
deploy-vercel.desc: Deploy projects to Vercel via API
